name: Simple Homemade Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Using a whisk or large fork, mix in the buttermilk and egg until well combined and smooth.
3. Stir in the melted butter.
4. Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
5. Using a 1/4 cup measure, pour pancake batter onto the hot griddle.
6. When the pancake is golden brown, flip it to cook the other side.
7. Keep warm in an oven heated to 275 degrees.
